sentences.base_language: I am a very famous music artist
sentences.target_language: 私はとても有名な音楽アーティストです
sentences.romanized: watashi wa totemo yuumei na ongaku aatisuto desu

sentences.base_language: I sang at the super bowl
sentences.target_language: 私はスーパーボウルで歌いました
sentences.romanized: watashi wa suupaa bouru de utaimashita

sentences.target_language: 私はプエルトリコ出身です

sentences.base_language: Do you want to learn one of my songs?
sentences.target_language: 私の曲を一つ覚えたいですか？
sentences.romanized: watashi no kyoku wo hitotsu oboetai desu ka?

sentences.base_language: Aunti asked me if I have so many girlfriends
sentences.target_language: おばさんは私に彼女がたくさんいるか聞いた
sentences.romanized: obasan wa watashi ni kanojo ga takusan iru ka kiita

sentences.base_language: Today I have one, tomorrow I'll have another, eh
sentences.target_language: 今日は一人、明日はまた別の人、えへ
sentences.romanized: kyou wa hitori, ashita wa mata betsu no hito, ehe

sentences.base_language: hey, but there's no wedding, there's no wedding, auntie
sentences.target_language: ねえ、でも結婚式はないよ、結婚式はないよ、おばさん
sentences.romanized: nee, demo kekkonshiki wa nai yo, kekkonshiki wa nai yo, obasan

sentences.base_language: I'm going to take them all to the V.I.P., the V.I.P., hey
sentences.target_language: みんなをVIPルームに連れて行くよ、VIPルームに、ねえ
sentences.romanized: minna wo VIP ruumu ni tsurete iku yo, VIP ruumu ni, nee

sentences.base_language: Let's take a selfie, "say cheese," hey
sentences.target_language: 自撮りしよう、「はい、チーズ」、ねえ

sentences.base_language: Let the ones I already slept with smile
sentences.target_language: もう寝た子たちは笑って
sentences.romanized: mou neta ko tachi wa waratte

sentences.base_language: In a V.I.P., a V.I.P., hey
sentences.target_language: VIPルームで、VIPルームで、ねえ
sentences.romanized: VIP ruumu de, VIP ruumu de, nee

sentences.target_language: 自撮りしよう、「はい、チーズ」
